commit.message:
fix(render): 修复 Markdown truecolor prose 误用 block tint (#26)

## 为什么
- 顶层 Markdown 段落里的 inline 注入被错误推断成 block region，导致 truecolor 终端里整行 prose
被套上背景 tint。
- 这轮渲染器把默认前景改成了更紧凑的输出方式，原来依赖显式默认前景 SGR 的若干断言也需要同步收紧到行为层面。

## 改了什么
- 将 Markdown `inline` 和 `pipe_table_cell` 注入显式标记为 `transparent`，避免顶层
prose 误用 block tint。
- 保留并完善 `tight-block` / `block` 的区分，同时新增最小 truecolor CJK 复现样例和对应回归测试。
- 修正 `KAT_DISABLE_TERMINAL_QUERIES=1` 的语义，并把若干依赖显式默认前景 SGR
的测试调整为基于渲染结果断言。

## 测试
- `cargo test --quiet`
- `cargo clippy --quiet --tests -- -D warnings`
- `cargo nextest run`

---------

Co-authored-by: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
docs(diagrams): show March orchestrator in lifecycle charts

Summary:
- replace the simplified flowcharts with orchestrator-aware sequence diagrams
- show March Orchestrator explicitly in README, docs index, and share docs
- make the merging handoff route through the orchestrator and builder lane

Rationale:
- the previous diagrams implied planner, builder, and auditor ran directly from the task surface
- the real system behavior is orchestrator-driven lane dispatch and re-entry
- the docs should match the actual runtime model users are learning

Tests:
- not run (docs-only change)

commit.message:
Skip redundant state normalization

Add a reference-equality fast path before normalizing delegated
annotation state in optional()/withDefault() re-entry checks. When the
inner parser returns the same state object, this avoids redundant
normalization work without changing the matchedness semantics.

https://github.com/dahlia/optique/pull/789#discussion_r3069479857

commit.message:
test(just): 补 recipe 分隔空行的 block tint 回归测试 (#25)

## 背景
- 根据截图排查 `Justfile` 的 block tint 边界，重点关注 recipe 末尾与下一条 recipe 之间的空行。
- 在最新 `master` 上，当前实现已经能正确把这类分隔空行排除在前一个 block tint 之外，没有复现出需要改实现的回归。
- 这次补一条回归测试，把当前正确行为锁住，避免后续退化。

## 改动
- 为 `Justfile` 增加最小回归测试，覆盖两个 recipe 之间带一个空行的场景。
- 断言前一个 recipe body 仍然带 tint，分隔空行和后一个 recipe header 不带 tint，后一个 recipe
body 继续带 tint。

## 验证
- `cargo test just_recipe_ -- --nocapture`

Co-authored-by: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

repository.name: kat
repository.description: A syntax-highlighting cat built around Tree-sitter.

commit.message:
feat(git): 补齐 Git Link、Git Log 与 Git Mailmap 支持 (#24)

## Why
- 目前 `language-coverage` 里仍有一组 Git 相关文件类型处于缺失或部分覆盖状态。
- 这些文件在日常仓库维护里出现频率高，但之前要么退回纯文本，要么 detector 入口不完整。

## What
- 新增 `git_link`、`git_mailmap`、`git_log` 三个独立 runtime，并为 `git_log` 复用现有
`diff` runtime 处理 patch 区块。
- 扩展 `ignore` detector，补齐 Git 的 `.git/info/exclude` 与全局
`.config/git/ignore` 路径。
- 补充对应 fixture / showcase、检测与渲染测试，并同步更新 `docs/language-coverage.md` 与
vendored grammar 文档。

## Testing
- `just test`
- 提交前 hook：`cargo fmt --check`、`cargo clippy`、`cargo nextest run`

---------

Co-authored-by: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
Preserve delegated Array subclasses

Treat only direct Array instances as plain delegated objects. Array
subclasses now go through the annotation-view path, which preserves their
prototype, methods, and private fields under optional() and
withDefault().

Add helper- and wrapper-level regressions covering delegated Array
subclasses in getDelegatedAnnotationState(), complete(), and
shouldDeferCompletion().

commit.message:
Refine new-element PLA type selection

Add a dedicated plaTypeSubtypeForNewElement override to
TH2FileEditElementEditController so new point, line, and area creation
can prefer an explicit MPPLATypeSubtype before falling back to the
last-used PLA type/subtype for that element kind.

Collapse the old public lastUsedPointType, lastUsedLineType, and
lastUsedAreaType string getters into private helpers and switch creation
and status-bar flows to the typed get*TypeAndSubtypeForNew* APIs.
Update the point command factory and affected regression tests so point
creation uses the requested type consistently.

Signed-off-by: Rodrigo Severo <rsev@pm.me>
Co-Authored-By: Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
Preserve re-entry state identity

Keep optional() and withDefault() from treating delegated annotation
wrappers as real parse-state changes on array re-entry. The matched-state
check now compares normalized delegated state, so annotation-view proxies
that unwrap to the original class instance stay on the unchanged-state
path.

Add a regression test for both wrappers covering annotated array re-entry
with class-based inner state and consumed input.

https://github.com/dahlia/optique/pull/789#discussion_r3069435290

Co-Authored-By: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
feat(query): 支持 Tree-sitter query 文件高亮展示 (#23)

## 为什么
- 当前 `grammars/*/queries/*.scm` 会退回接近纯文本，日常阅读和维护体验不够好。
- #19 希望优先按 `grammars/*/queries/*.scm` 路径规则，为
`highlights.scm`、`injections.scm`、`locals.scm` 这类 Tree-sitter query
文件提供可读的高亮展示。

## 改动
- 新增 vendored `query` grammar/runtime，并按 `grammars/*/queries/*.scm`
路径规则识别 Tree-sitter query 文件。
- 补了 query 专用 `highlights.scm`，覆盖 comment、node name、field
name、capture、predicate、string/escape、quantifier 和基础标点。
- 增加 fixture/showcase、回归测试分组，以及语言覆盖/第三方归属/ vendored grammar 说明文档。
- 当前刻意只覆盖 `grammars/*/queries/*.scm`，不把更泛化的 `.scm` 一起并入。

## 测试
- `just test`

Closes #19

Co-authored-by: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
Guard selection zoom against invalid viewport sizes

Make selection-window zoom return early when the destination viewport is
not initialized yet, and clamp zero-size selections to the minimum
drawing size before computing the zoom factor. This prevents paste and
duplicate flows from producing non-finite scales during cross-file and
headless controller workflows.

Signed-off-by: Rodrigo Severo <rsev@pm.me>
Co-Authored-By: Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
Fix image insert path rebasing

Resolve inserted image filenames from absolute normalized paths before
rebasing them relative to the TH2 file. This keeps image-insert command
creation stable when callers provide workspace-relative filenames, which
fixes the PathException seen by the image insert regression tests.

refactor(test): 按需初始化 runtime 并均衡 nextest 测试分组 (#22)

## Why
- 现有测试运行时间主要被语言 runtime 的首次全量初始化放大，单个轻量测试也会为 80+ runtime 付出冷启动成本。
- `nextest` 下的 fixture / showcase 聚合测试分组不均衡，关键路径被少数大测试拖长，影响日常开发反馈速度。

## What
- 将语言 runtime 从首次全量初始化改为按需初始化，并把仅用于判断可用性的路径改成只查静态 descriptor，避免无谓编译。
- 将 `fixture` 与 `showcase` 聚合测试按家族拆分，并补充覆盖校验，确保新增样例不会漏进任何测试组。
- 保持 `CI`、`prek` 和 `just test` 继续统一使用 `nextest`，不改变自动化入口语义。

## Testing
- `just test`
- `cargo nextest run --config-file .config/nextest.toml --cargo-quiet
--failure-output final --no-tests pass -j 8`
- `cargo test --lib
tests::bash_highlights_shebang_special_variables_regex_and_parameters --
--exact`
- `cargo test --lib
tests::github_actions_advanced_workflow_inherits_default_shell_and_highlights_nested_expressions
-- --exact`
- `cargo test --lib language_runtime::tests`

## Notes
- 本地当前分支下 `just test` 的 `nextest` summary 约为 `5.6s`，相比最初那次约 `117s`
的样本已经显著下降。

---------

Co-authored-by: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
fix(desktop): bypass local browser auth for desktop runtime

Summary:
- set a desktop-only environment flag on the Electron-launched
  `openase all-in-one` child process
- skip wiring the human browser auth service when that desktop flag is
  present so the local loopback runtime opens straight into the
  workspace
- add focused desktop unit tests and app-level flag parsing tests for
  the new auth bypass path

Rationale:
- desktop users were landing on the local bootstrap/login gate even for
  a packaged app that owns the loopback runtime on the same machine
- limiting the bypass to the desktop-spawned child process avoids
  changing the normal CLI and server authentication behavior

Tests:
- `go test ./internal/app`
- `corepack pnpm --dir desktop exec vitest run tests/unit/service-process.test.js tests/integration/service-lifecycle.test.js`
- packaged desktop smoke with fresh PostgreSQL config and verified
  `/api/v1/auth/session` returned `login_required=false`

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

repository.name: openase
repository.description: Ticket-Driven Automated Software Engineering. OpenASE is an all-in-one platform that turns tickets into working code — AI agents automatically pick up tickets, execute workflows on your machines, and deliver results with full traceability.

type consistently.

commit.message:
Fix cyclic delegated normalization

Handle the latest cyclic normalization review feedback:

- Preserve normalized back-references when delegated carrier removal forces a clone inside a cycle.
- Keep identity for fully unchanged cyclic graphs.
- Add a regression test that exercises the cloned back-reference path.

Review comment:

- https://github.com/dahlia/optique/pull/789#discussion_r3069263743

Co-Authored-By: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
Tighten optional-like retries

Handle the latest optional()/withDefault() review feedback:

- Gate wrapped-state false-result retries on delegated carriers.
- Retry phase-two completion for wrapped initial-state fallbacks before falling back to the extractor.
- Skip deep normalization when delegated carriers were never introduced.
- Add regression coverage for plain undefined failures and wrapped phase-two completion paths.

Review comments:

- https://github.com/dahlia/optique/pull/789#discussion_r3069261484
- https://github.com/dahlia/optique/pull/789#discussion_r3069261493
- https://github.com/dahlia/optique/pull/789#discussion_r3069262289
- https://github.com/dahlia/optique/pull/789#discussion_r3069262291
- https://github.com/dahlia/optique/pull/789#discussion_r3069263742

Co-Authored-By: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
fix(render): 修复嵌套 overlay 退化并统一 block 几何 (#18)

## Why
- `worker-configuration.d.ts` 这类大型 TypeScript 声明文件会在嵌套 overlay
合并阶段出现严重性能退化，看起来像卡死。
- 前一轮 render 优化暴露了两个视觉问题：多行注释跨行样式会丢失，嵌套 block 的几何又会被宿主包装行放大，导致 raw
string / JSDoc 这类区域的 block tint 范围不稳定。
- 日常调试时还需要显式写 `cargo run --bin kat`，命令有些啰嗦。

## What
- 把 `overlay_nested_region` 和 `overlay_style_spans` 改成基于已排序 spans 的线性
merge，避免对每个 injected region 全量重建整份 spans。
- 修正 `render_styled_spans` 的按行 span 切片逻辑，保留跨多行 span 在后续行上的活跃状态。
- 把嵌套注入区域的视觉策略收口到 runtime 统一推导：独立的多行 block 会自动拿到 block tint，显式 inline
注入继续保持透明叠加。
- 在 block 几何推导里区分 `content` / `blank` / `wrapper` 行；wrapper 行不再参与 block
的纵向或横向范围，宿主定界符也不会再被 block tint 包进去。
- 保留轻量版 `KAT_DEBUG_PROGRESS` 阶段日志，并把 `Cargo.toml` 的默认运行目标设成 `kat`。
- 补充回归测试，覆盖 overlay 合并语义、多行注释跨行样式、JSDoc block tint、inline template 注入保持
inline，以及 Rust raw-string SQL 的 block 几何。

## Testing
- `KAT_AGENT_TEST_LOG_MODE=quiet just test`
- `cargo run --release --
/Users/dcjanus/Code/hacknews-feeds/worker-configuration.d.ts --paging
never --debug-timing`
- `cargo run --release -- testdata/showcase/rust/injections.rs --paging
never --debug-timing`

---------

Co-authored-by: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

repository.name: kat
repository.description: A syntax-highlighting cat built around Tree-sitter.

commit.message:
Retry wrapped initial-state fallback

Wrapped initial-state carriers need a narrow false-result retry path so
optional-like wrappers can recover the original undefined initial state
contract without masking legitimate delegated failures.

https://github.com/dahlia/optique/pull/789#discussion_r3069156025
https://github.com/dahlia/optique/pull/789#discussion_r3069156027

commit.message:
Vectorize rolling spreads, deduplicate export, and fix ancillary/template issues

P2 medium/low-severity improvements from deep code review:
- A1: vectorized rolling-average loop in _find_daily_ordered_trade
- E1: merged export_to_excel/export_to_bytes into shared _write_excel_workbook
- N2: capacity-price aggregation uses time-duration-weighted mean
- M2: FI_FCR template hours aligned to Fingrid 0-indexed convention
- D10/M5: Elexon fetchers batch date ranges into single requests
- C2: removed dead GBP_TO_EUR constant from config

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

Fix cache poisoning, mixed-resolution crash, Elexon/Fingrid/Regelleistung data fetchers

P1 high-severity fixes from deep code review:
- D2: clean_prices tags filled rows; write_cache persists only real data
- D4: mixed 60min/15min resolution splits by cadence instead of crashing
- D3/M4: fetch_elexon_generation uses business-time from/to params
- D7/M3: Fingrid switched to v2 API path, corrected dataset IDs
  (FCR: 317/318/283, aFRR: 52/51), added optional FINGRID_API_KEY
- D8/F1: Regelleistung auto-fetch disabled (no stable JSON endpoint),
  returns None with manual-upload guidance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

Fix 4 critical bugs: GB negative prices, revenue per-MW calc, energy annualisation, GB manual upload units

P0 priority fixes from deep code review:
- D1: preserve negative GBP prices in Elexon fetch (was: > 0, now: != 0)
- N1: merge_revenue_stack uses explicit power_mw for per-MW normalization
  instead of brittle DA-ratio shortcut (broken when DA revenue = 0)
- N3: energy annualisation removes erroneous duration_hours multiplier
  (was EUR·h, now EUR — correct dimensional analysis)
- M1: manual GB_BALANCING upload now converts GBP→EUR using yearly FX
  rates, matching auto-fetch path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
feat: model-aware max_tokens, translatable tool descriptions, ZAI tool calling, UI polish (#45)

* feat: model-aware max_tokens, translatable tool descriptions, ZAI tool calling, and UI polish

- Add model-aware max_tokens via GetModelMaxOutputTokens()/EffectiveMaxTokens
  on BaseAiProvider, with ZAI capped at 4095 (coding API limit)
- Gate request.Tools on ToolOutputFormat — providers using AireText no longer
  send native tools in the API request
- Fix ZAI/GLM tool calls: override DefaultToolOutputFormat to AireText and
  add unclosed <tool_call tag recovery in ToolCallParser
- Make all tool descriptions translatable with question format (e.g. "Take a
  screenshot?" instead of "Taking a screenshot") across all 12 languages
- Fix close button content color: change ✕ (U+2715) to × (U+00D7) and remove
  unnecessary AccentTextBrush Foreground overrides across 10 XAML files
- Add AccentTextBrush to AppTheme.xaml for title text consistency
- Refactor provider tests to share SimpleJsonServer infrastructure
- Add app-layer service tests (ChatInteraction, Conversation, ProviderCatalog)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: update tool description assertions for question format

BuildDescription() now produces question-style descriptions and recovers
unclosed tool_call tags, so tests were updated to match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: human-readable provider errors + test coverage for 15 application services

- Replace generic catch-all error messages with descriptive ones in
  OpenAiProvider, GoogleAiProvider, and OllamaProvider
- Add authentication-specific errors, model-not-found errors, and
  network-error sanitization via ProviderErrorClassifier.SanitizeNetworkError()
- Stop leaking raw API response bodies in GoogleAiProvider and OllamaProvider
- Add streaming-failure error markers instead of silent yield break
- Add ~150 new tests covering 15 previously untested application services:
  MCP (McpCatalog, McpConfig, McpStartup), Onboarding (Ollama, ProviderSetup),
  Provider workflows (Setup, EditorSave, ModelCatalog, CapabilityTestSession,
  CodexAction, OllamaAction, OllamaModelCatalog), Tools (ApprovalPrompt,
  ApprovalExecution), Chat (ChatTurn), Settings (AppSettings),
  Connections (EmailAccount)
- Update roadmap with completed P0 tasks and progress on P2 items

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ci): exclude WPF MainWindowTests from default test run

MainWindowTests require an interactive desktop session (STA threading,
WPF window creation) which is unavailable in headless CI runners.
Exclude them from the default 'all' scope to prevent testhost crashes.
They can still be run explicitly with scope=ui.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Tighten delegated completion paths

Preserve delegated completion failures instead of retrying them on the
normalized fallback state, and deep-normalize delegated carriers out of
nested completion values and phase-two seeds.

This also rewraps injected primitive carriers from their unwrapped value
so delegated annotation propagation does not mutate an existing wrapper
object in place.

https://github.com/dahlia/optique/pull/789#discussion_r3069032184
https://github.com/dahlia/optique/pull/789#discussion_r3069032187
https://github.com/dahlia/optique/pull/789#discussion_r3069033269
https://github.com/dahlia/optique/pull/789#discussion_r3069033307
https://github.com/dahlia/optique/pull/789#discussion_r3069033308
